title: SnapAPI Screenshot Response
description: Describes the binary screenshot response and the usage signaling headers returned by POST /api/screenshot. The response body itself is raw PNG or JPEG image data; this schema models the metadata surface.

contentType.description: MIME type of the returned image.

X-Usage-Used.description: Number of requests used this calendar month.

X-Usage-Limit.description: Total monthly request allowance for the API key's tier.
